summary: Swiss Ephemeris integration testing completed successfully. 28/28 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working: Chart page shows accurate Sun (Taurus), Moon (Virgo), Rising (Taurus) signs, planetary positions with degrees, 12 house cusps (Placidus), aspects with orbs, and chart patterns (Grand Trine Earth, Stelliums). Transits page shows real outer planet transits to natal chart.

minor.issue: Chiron calculation fails due to missing seas_18.se1 ephemeris file (known limitation of built-in Moshier ephemeris). Error is silently caught and chiron is excluded from chart.

passed_tests: Backend: Swiss Ephemeris calculation method confirmed
Backend: Sun sign accurate - Taurus (expected for 1994-04-23)
Backend: Moon sign accurate - Virgo
Backend: Rising sign accurate - Taurus
Backend: Julian Day calculated correctly
Backend: All 10 major planets present (sun, moon, mercury, venus, mars, jupiter, saturn, uranus, neptune, pluto)
Backend: North Node and South Node calculated
Backend: Nodes are exactly opposite (180 degrees)
Backend: All planets have sign, degree, sign_degree, house fields
Backend: 12 house cusps present (Placidus system)
Backend: Houses have degree, sign, sign_degree fields
Backend: House 1 matches Ascendant
Backend: Ascendant and Midheaven calculated
Backend: Aspects calculated between planets
Backend: Aspect types valid (conjunction, sextile, square, trine, opposition)
Backend: Grand Trine (Earth) pattern detected
Backend: Stellium patterns detected (Taurus, Scorpio)
Backend: Transits endpoint returns outer planet transits
Backend: Transits include sign information
Backend: Transits from Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune, Pluto only
Backend: Khemisset, Morocco coordinates correct (33.8242, -6.0662)
Backend: Partial city name matching works
Backend: Unknown cities return (0.0, 0.0)
Backend: Compatibility uses Swiss Ephemeris for both partners
Backend: Synastry aspects calculated from real positions
Frontend: Chart page loads without errors
Frontend: Big Three cards show Sun (Taurus), Moon (Virgo), Rising (Taurus)
Frontend: Planetary positions show sign, degree, and house
Frontend: House cusps display with degree values
Frontend: Major aspects displayed with orb values
Frontend: Chart patterns (Grand Trine, Stelliums) displayed
Frontend: Transits page shows real transits with strength percentages
Frontend: Transit interpretations and action items displayed
critical_code_review_comments: Chiron calculation silently fails when ephemeris file is missing - consider logging a warning or displaying 'Chiron: N/A' in UI instead of omitting entirely
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_SwissEphemeris_Partner and TEST_Synastry_Partner compatibility reports during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Swiss Ephemeris is fully integrated and working. User nchobah@gmail.com has correct Big Three: Sun Taurus, Moon Virgo, Rising Taurus. Chart includes 10 planets + lunar nodes (no Chiron due to missing ephemeris file). Houses use Placidus system. Transits calculate from current outer planet positions to natal chart. Compatibility uses Swiss Ephemeris for both partners' charts.

features_verified.Chart patterns (Grand Trine, T-Square, S: PASS - Grand Trine (Earth), Stellium in Taurus, Stellium in Scorpio

known_limitations.Chiron calculation: Requires seas_18.se1 ephemeris file which is not included in built-in Moshier ephemeris. Chiron is omitted from chart data.
known_limitations.City coordinates: Limited to pre-defined cities in CITY_COORDINATES dictionary. Unknown cities return (0.0, 0.0) which results in Unknown rising sign.
